action: Recurring macOS-CI EBADF flake in go/internal/phases/ship tests: 685039e fixed temp-dir cleanup EBADF, but the class recurred 2026-06-07 in TestShipFromWorktree_GitAddFails_Errors via runGit's pipe read ('git [rev-parse HEAD]: read |0: bad file descriptor', macos-latest only, 20/20 local race runs green). Harden the shared test git-runner against the whole class: retry-once on EBADF/EPIPE read errors in runGit/CombinedOutput paths (deterministic, test-infra-only), or capture output via files instead of pipes on darwin. Acceptance: the specific failure signature cannot recur (inject EBADF in a unit test of the runner helper if practical); no production code changes.
evidence_pointer: gh run failures on commit b4d643a (workflow go, macos-latest)
